text: Chapter 15 teaches consecutive 16th notes via the construction and internalization of polyrhythmic cells: combining patterns to create 6/4 and complex 3/4-over-4/4 phrasing structures. The characteristic move emphasizes moving these techniques from conscious practice into unconscious fluency through random, unscripted application. Verifiable structural rules anchor the work: the 5/4-over-4/4 pattern aligns on the sixth bar; the 7/4-over-4/4 cycle completes in eight bars, providing self-check landmarks. Load-bearing concept is polyrhythmic layering, stacking cells to obscure the underlying 4/4 grid, with randomized repetition embedding complex rhythmic relationships into intuition.
